name: 3-fluoro-N-1H-indol-5-yl-5-morpholin-4-ylbenzamide
description: 3-fluoro-N-1H-indol-5-yl-5-morpholin-4-ylbenzamide is a solid. This compound belongs to the phenylmorpholines. These are aromatic compounds containing a morpholine ring and a benzene ring linked to each other through a CC or a CN bond. This drug targets mitogen-activated protein kinase 14.
